title: thlaspi inhumile
intro: Thlaspi inhumile, also known as field pennycress, is a biennial or annual plant species in the family Brassicaceae, commonly found in fields and meadows. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Thlaspi inhumile include its ability to help reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or oil to create teas, infusions, or topical creams, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
